nasb.text: So he went and hired himself out to one of the citizens of that country, and he sent him into his fields to feed swine.

esv.text: So he went and hired himself out to  one of the citizens of that country, who sent him into his fields to feed pigs.

cnv.text: 於是他去投靠當地的一個居民。那人打發他到田裡去放豬，

ccb.text: 只好投靠一个当地人。那人派他到田里去放猪，

csbs.text: 于是他去投靠当地的一个居民，那人打发他到自己的田里去放猪。
